questions.text: What lesson does 'A Game of Chance' teach?
questions.explanation: The story warns against the dangers of gambling and shows how it can lead to loss and regret.

questions.text: The main character lost all his money at the fair.
questions.explanation: In the story, the protagonist gambles away all his money at the fair games, learning a hard lesson.

questions.text: Why did Rasheed feel foolish after the fair?
questions.correctAnswer: He realized he had been tricked into gambling and lost all his money.
questions.explanation: Rasheed understood that the game was rigged and he had been fooled by the shopkeeper's tricks.

questions.text: Rasheed's uncle advised him not to ________ at the fair.
questions.explanation: Rasheed's uncle warned him against gambling at the fair, but he didn't listen and lost his money.
